def positive_celery_delay_in_loop_without_canvas():
    rule_id = "celery_delay_in_loop_without_canvas"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Celery tasks dispatch .delay(...) or .apply_async(...) inside loops without an obvious canvas primitive such as group() or chord()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
